summary: Completed testing of Weekly Excel Report Export feature (Iteration 10). All backend API tests pass (12/12). Frontend 'Haftalik Rapor' button works correctly and triggers file download. Daily drill-down regression test also passes.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/analytics/export?period=weekly&week_offset=-1 returns 200
Backend API: GET /api/analytics/export?period=monthly returns 200
Backend API: Response Content-Type is Excel (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)
Backend API: Response has Content-Disposition header with .xlsx filename
Backend API: Downloaded Excel has exactly 4 sheets
Backend API: Sheet names are correct: Haftalik Ozet, Makine Detayi, Operator Performansi, Defo Raporu
Backend API: Haftalik Ozet sheet has 7 day rows (Pazartesi through Pazar)
Backend API: Haftalik Ozet column headers: Gun, Tarih, Toplam Koli, Tamamlanan Is, Baslayan Is, Operator Sayisi, Defo (kg)
Backend API: Makine Detayi sheet has Makine column and TOPLAM column
Backend API: Operator Performansi headers: Operator, Tamamlanan Is, Toplam Koli, Ort. Koli/Is, Calistigi Makineler, Ort. Sure (dk)
Backend API: Defo Raporu headers: Tarih, Makine, Defo (kg), Operator, Aciklama
Backend API: week_offset=-1 parameter works correctly
Frontend: Management login with 'buse11993' works
Frontend: Analiz tab accessible and shows Günlük Üretim card
Frontend: 'Haftalik Rapor' button exists with data-testid='weekly-report-btn'
Frontend: Button is visible in Günlük Üretim card header
Frontend: Week navigation arrows (← →) work correctly
Frontend: Clicking 'Haftalik Rapor' button triggers file download (buse_kagit_rapor_weekly.xlsx)
Frontend: Daily drill-down still works - clicking bar opens detail dialog (regression check)
Frontend: Daily detail dialog shows correct data (100 koli, 2 jobs, 2 operators for 31 Mart 2026)

sheets.Haftalik Ozet: Daily breakdown with 7 rows (Mon-Sun), columns: Gun, Tarih, Toplam Koli, Tamamlanan Is, Baslayan Is, Operator Sayisi, Defo (kg)
sheets.Makine Detayi: Machine-by-machine daily production with day columns and TOPLAM
sheets.Operator Performansi: Operator stats: Tamamlanan Is, Toplam Koli, Ort. Koli/Is, Calistigi Makineler, Ort. Sure (dk)
sheets.Defo Raporu: Defect logs: Tarih, Makine, Defo (kg), Operator, Aciklama

frontend_button.location: Günlük Üretim card header, next to week navigation arrows

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data from week 30 Mar - 05 Apr 2026 (100 koli on 2026-03-31)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Excel Export feature fully tested. The 'Haftalik Rapor' button (data-testid='weekly-report-btn') is in the Günlük Üretim card header in the Analiz tab. Clicking it downloads an Excel file with 4 sheets: Haftalik Ozet, Makine Detayi, Operator Performansi, Defo Raporu. Use week_offset=-1 for testing (week 30 Mar - 05 Apr 2026 has 100 koli data). The daily drill-down feature from iteration 9 still works correctly.
